description: CLI startup profiling now works end-to-end via a hidden `--capture-profile` flag that stops the AppHost after startup, waits for profiling spans to settle, and exports a dashboard trace zip archive. A dedicated OTLP provider captures process spans for aspire.exe, npm, npx, and guest processes, making it possible to diagnose startup bottlenecks in release builds without custom external tooling.
name: CLI startup self-profiling with trace export
